prompt: Overhead top-down shot of a polished dark wood floor with sharp geometric light pattern — a single rectangle of hard side-light cutting diagonally across the frame from an unseen window. Deep jade green and black tones. The light shape is precise, theatrical, clean-edged. Polished reflective surface. No people. Rigid symmetrical composition, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
